## Checklist

- [ ] One focused wave and one PR
- [ ] Red-first failure is retained in the wave evidence record
- [ ] Every changed `.rkt` file is formatted and compiles
- [ ] Focused tests pass
- [ ] `racket scripts/lint-all.rkt` passes
- [ ] `racket scripts/run-tests.rkt --suite fast` passes
- [ ] Independent reviewer returned `APPROVED` for the recorded implementation SHA
- [ ] External STATE/VALIDATION is current, not `Not started`
- [ ] All required GitHub checks pass on the exact current PR head
- [ ] Documentation/CHANGELOG updated when applicable
